name: SDLC Sequential Assessors All Approve Pipeline
description: Software-delivery workflow where required assessors approve in sequence on the same revision.
outcome: Required assessor completion order may be sequential without changing successor legality.

definition.process_instructions: The required assessors approve the same active subject revision in sequence before release packaging starts.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: implementation
stages.goal: The change is implemented and assessed.
